name: copilot-gmail-connector
description: Gmail integration for GitHub Copilot Chat — browse, read, search, compose and manage emails from VS Code

gmailConnector.clientId.description: Google OAuth2 Client ID (from Google Cloud Console)

viewsWelcome.contents:
Connect your Gmail account to browse, search and manage emails right from VS Code.
[Connect Gmail](command:gmail-connector.connect)

You need a Google Cloud OAuth Client ID.
See [Setup Guide](command:gmail-connector.openSetup) for instructions.

chatParticipants.name: gmail
chatParticipants.description: Manage your Gmail — read, search, compose, reply, and organize emails

commands.name: read
commands.description: Read a specific email by ID or subject

languageModelTools.name: gmail_add_account
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Add a new Gmail account with a label (e.g. 'personal', 'work', 'client'). Opens browser for Google OAuth. After adding, this becomes the active account. The user can have multiple Gmail accounts and switch between them. Always ask the user what label they want for the account.

languageModelTools.name: gmail_list_accounts
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Lists all connected Gmail accounts with their labels, email addresses, and which one is active. Use when the user asks which accounts are connected or before switching accounts.

languageModelTools.name: gmail_switch_account
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Switch the active Gmail account by label. All subsequent Gmail operations will use this account. Use when user says 'check my work email', 'switch to client account', etc. Call gmail_list_accounts first if you don't know available labels.

languageModelTools.name: gmail_remove_account
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Removes a connected Gmail account by label and deletes its stored token. Confirm with user before removing. If this was the active account, switches to another available account.

languageModelTools.name: gmail_connection_status
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Shows all connected Gmail accounts and which is active. Use when user asks about connection status, which accounts are connected, or which email is being used.

languageModelTools.name: gmail_check_inbox
languageModelTools.userDescription: Check your Gmail inbox for recent emails
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Fetches recent Gmail inbox emails. Returns subject, sender, date, snippet, and message ID. Uses the active account unless 'account' parameter specifies a different label (e.g. 'work', 'client'). If user says 'check my work email', set account to 'work'.

account.description: Account label to use (e.g. 'personal', 'work'). Omit to use active account.

languageModelTools.name: gmail_search_emails
languageModelTools.userDescription: Search your Gmail for specific emails
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Searches Gmail using Gmail search syntax. Supports 'from:', 'subject:', 'is:unread', 'has:attachment', 'after:2025/01/01'. Uses active account unless 'account' param specifies a label.

account.description: Account label to use. Omit for active account.

languageModelTools.name: gmail_read_email
languageModelTools.userDescription: Read the full content of a Gmail message
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Reads full email content by message ID. Returns from, to, date, subject, body, labels. Uses active account unless specified.

account.description: Account label. Omit for active account.

languageModelTools.name: gmail_send_email
languageModelTools.userDescription: Send an email from your Gmail
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Sends a new email. Requires to, subject, body. Always confirm with user before sending. Uses active account unless specified.

account.description: Account label to send from. Omit for active account.

languageModelTools.name: gmail_reply_to_email
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Replies to an existing Gmail message. Requires messageId and body. Confirm with user before sending.

account.description: Account label. Omit for active account.

languageModelTools.name: gmail_get_labels
languageModelTools.userDescription: List your Gmail labels and folders
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Lists all Gmail labels (folders) including system and custom labels.

account.description: Account label. Omit for active account.

languageModelTools.name: aws_s3_list_buckets
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Lists all S3 buckets in the user's AWS account. Returns bucket names and creation dates.

languageModelTools.name: aws_s3_list_objects
languageModelTools.userDescription: List objects in an S3 bucket
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Lists objects in an AWS S3 bucket, optionally filtered by prefix. Returns object keys and sizes.

prefix.description: Optional key prefix to filter objects

languageModelTools.name: aws_s3_get_object
languageModelTools.userDescription: Read content of an S3 object
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Downloads and reads the content of an S3 object. Best for text files. Returns first 3000 chars of content.

languageModelTools.name: aws_lambda_list_functions
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Lists Lambda functions in the user's AWS account. Returns function name, runtime, memory, and timeout.

languageModelTools.name: aws_lambda_invoke
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Invokes a Lambda function with an optional JSON payload. Returns the function result. Confirm with user before invoking.

languageModelTools.name: aws_ec2_list_instances
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Lists EC2 instances in the user's AWS account with instance ID, type, and state.

languageModelTools.name: aws_ec2_manage_instance
languageModelTools.userDescription: Start, stop, or reboot an EC2 instance
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Start, stop, or reboot an EC2 instance. Requires instance ID and action. Always confirm with the user before executing.

languageModelTools.name: aws_cloudwatch_log_groups
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Lists CloudWatch log groups, optionally filtered by prefix. Returns group name, storage size, and retention.

prefix.description: Optional log group name prefix filter

languageModelTools.name: aws_cloudwatch_get_logs
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Fetches recent log events from a CloudWatch log group. If no stream specified, uses the latest stream. Returns timestamps and messages.

languageModelTools.name: vercel_list_projects
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Lists Vercel projects in the user's account. Returns project name, framework, and last update date.

languageModelTools.name: vercel_list_deployments
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Lists recent Vercel deployments. Optionally filter by project name. Returns deployment name, state, URL, and date.

languageModelTools.name: vercel_deployment_details
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get details of a Vercel deployment
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Gets full details of a specific Vercel deployment by ID. Returns name, URL, state, target, git commit, and branch.

languageModelTools.name: vercel_list_domains
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Lists all domains in the user's Vercel account with verification status and nameservers.

languageModelTools.name: vercel_list_env_vars
languageModelTools.userDescription: List environment variables of a Vercel project
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Lists environment variables for a Vercel project. Shows keys and targets but NOT values (for security). Use to check what env vars are configured.
